allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"共有 {data['count']} 场比赛\\"\); print\(f\\"第一场: {data['matches'][0]['home_team']} vs {data['matches'][0]['away_team']} \(ID: {data['matches'][0]['match_id']}\)\\"\)")
